name: Five-Pepper Fajitas (Lf) Revised
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicken into chunks about 1/2 inch square.
2. Place them in a large bowl. Squeeze the lime juice over the chicken.
3. Add the garlic, scallions, black pepper, and cumin, and toss to mix.
4. Slice the bell peppers into strips and set aside.
5. Wrap the tortillas in a thin, clean dishcloth, place them on an ovenproof plate, and put the plate in the oven.
6. Warm the tortillas at the lowest setting on your oven while preparing the fajita mixture.
7. Heat the oil and water in a large saucepan over medium heat and add the chicken, bell peppers, and jalapeno peppers.
8. Add the greater amount of jalapeno if you like your food very spicy.
9. Saute, stirring frequently, until the chicken and vegetables are cooked through, about 25 minutes.
10. Add salt to taste.
11. Spread a spoonful of the fajita mixture in a thick line in the middle of each tortilla.
12. Top with cilantro, tomato, and salsa to taste.
13. Roll up the tortillas and serve. Makes 4 servings of 2 fajitas each.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
